name: generic-accessibility-qa
description: Generic automation QA project for accessibility testing on LinkedIn-style web applications.

scripts.test:accessibility:sitemap: npm run sitemap:load && npm run test:accessibility:full
scripts.test:accessibility:sitemap:quick: npm run sitemap:load:quick && npm run test:accessibility:full
scripts.test:accessibility:sitemap:pr: npm run sitemap:load:pr && npm run test:accessibility:full
scripts.test:accessibility:sitemap:full: npm run sitemap:load:full && npm run test:accessibility:full
scripts.test:accessibility:quick: npm run test:accessibility && npm run report:accessibility:developer
scripts.test:accessibility:pr: npm run test:accessibility:sitemap:pr && npm run report:accessibility:developer
scripts.accessibility:ci: npm run test:accessibility:sitemap:full && npm run report:accessibility:developer
